Created attachment 169889
Diff patch between current port version and upgrade to v2.3.10

Diff patch between current port version and upgrade to v2.3.10

Simple update to latest version. Only had to change version numbers and checksums in Makefile and distinfo, not even any pkg-plist changes.

All tests PASS.

portlint -AC: PASS
make check-plist: PASS
poudriere testport: PASS on 10.1amd64

NOTE: I'd like to rename this port devel/sope2. PR 208405 discusses this rename.
